heroSection.heading: The future
heroSection.subtitle: Educational and Research Institute of Cybernetics, Information Technologies and Engineering, NUWM

entrantCta.heading: Ready to start your
entrantCta.description: Apply to NUWM right now and choose the program that matches your ambitions.

advantages.title: Practice-oriented education
advantages.desc: Study programs combine theoretical foundations with real projects. Current tech stack, industry-grade tasks and practitioner lecturers — from day one.

advantages.title: Specialties of the digital future
advantages.desc: Cybersecurity, computer science, software engineering, data engineering — fields where demand consistently outpaces supply on the job market.

advantages.title: Academic mobility and international opportunities
advantages.desc: Exchange programs, international conferences and joint projects with partner universities open doors far beyond a single campus.

advantages.title: Experience and tradition
advantages.desc: Years of training specialists, stable rankings among Ukrainian universities and graduates holding key positions in IT companies and research institutions.
